heading: Youndegin vs Yourdamung Lake — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Youndegin, Western Australia and Yourdamung Lake, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Youndegin has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Yourdamung Lake (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Youndegin or Yourdamung Lake safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Youndegin has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Yourdamung Lake scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Youndegin scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Yourdamung Lake scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Youndegin or Yourdamung Lake?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Youndegin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
